docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVTECH CAPITAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT NEBULA GENOMICS HOLDING, INC PROPHASE LABS, INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF EVAN S. STRASSBERG IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVTECH CAPITAL LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVTECH CAPITAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEBULA GENOMICS HOLDING, INC PROPHASE LABS, INC $5,470,560.52 PRINCIPAL, $466,721.13 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,937,716.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
